title: Personal Knowledge Pipeline — crawl4ai + Supabase + Obsidian + LLM-Brains
description: Unified research ingestion system: web crawling via crawl4ai, YouTube transcripts, stored in local Supabase with pgvector, synced to Obsidian vault, and bridged into LLM-Brains SQLite RAG.

stories.title: Supabase schema: research_items table with pgvector
stories.evidence: docker exec confirmed: table created with all columns, vector(1536) embedding, ivfflat index, gin tag index, unique url constraint, update trigger

stories.title: crawl4ai → Supabase ingestion
stories.evidence: pipeline/crawl.py written; crawl4ai + Playwright installed via python3.12; upsert-on-url dedup implemented

stories.title: YouTube transcript ingestion for Berman/Herk/Roberts
stories.evidence: Live test: Karpathy video ingested — 109,129 chars stored in Supabase. API fixed to v2 (instance-based .fetch()). All 3 channels defined with tags.

stories.title: Obsidian vault sync
stories.evidence: kp sync wrote ~/Documents/Obsidian Vault/Research/YouTube/let-s-build-gpt-from-scratch-in-code-spelled-out.md with YAML frontmatter

stories.title: LLM-Brains bridge
stories.evidence: kp sync wrote ~/LLM-Brains/brain/raw/research/let-s-build-gpt-from-scratch-in-code-spelled-out.md — dedup by slug prevents re-writing

stories.title: Unified CLI with .env config
stories.evidence: kp stats, kp sync, kp channels all work. .env with real credentials. kp alias added to ~/.zshrc. README.md written.
